message:
test(color-types): expand from 7 to 63 tests for color math library (wa-2iabb)

Cover SrgbaPixel rgba/roundtrip/to_linear/as_srgba_tuple, SrgbaTuple
construction from u8/f32 tuples, premultiply/demultiply/interpolate/
mul_alpha, string conversions (rgb/rgba/x11), named colors (transparent/
none/clear/case-insensitive), sRGB<->linear roundtrips, HSL operations
(lighten/complement/triad/square), LinearRgba (transparent/when_transparent/
mul_alpha/with_components/conversions/luminance/contrast ratio), Hash
consistency, FromStr edge cases, and delta_e color difference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
